summary: Responsive farm business website for N.B. Farm with classical retro Indian rural aesthetic. Features warm earthy tones, Indian motifs (rangoli, jute textures, hand-painted borders), elegant serif/handwritten fonts. Includes hero section, about page, products (Gir A2 Milk at ₹70/L & Natural Mangoes at ₹100/kg), Why Choose Us, delivery info, Google Maps location, WhatsApp/contact integration, and footer. Mobile-friendly, SEO optimized, smooth scrolling.
architectural_notes: Classical retro Indian rural aesthetic: warm earthy tones (mud brown, turmeric yellow, leaf green, terracotta, off-white), serif+handwritten fonts, rangoli/jute/hand-painted border motifs
Mobile-first responsive design with smooth scrolling, fast loading, and local SEO optimization
WhatsApp ordering integration using click-to-chat links (wa.me/9978510084)
known_issues: Hero section top heading ('Straight from Kutch, Gujarat' or similar) is partially cut off on page load; needs vertical offset adjustment.
WhatsApp pre-order for mangoes is not working — needs to be fixed.

existing_features.title: Apply a classical retro Indian rural visual theme across the entire site: warm earthy color palette (mud brown #6B3A2A, turmeric yellow #E8A020, leaf green #4A7C3F, terracotta #C1440E, off-white #FAF3E0), elegant serif headings paired with a handwritten-style accent font, subtle rangoli-inspired decorative dividers, jute texture overlays on section backgrounds, and hand-painted border motifs on cards and sections. The overall feel should be premium, organic, natural, and trustworthy.

Build a full-screen Hero section at the top of the page using the generated Indian farm sunrise illustration as background. Display the headline 'Pure Desi Goodness from Our Farm to Your Home', subtext 'Fresh Gir A2 Milk from ethically raised cows. Seasonal mangoes grown with natural care.', and two CTA buttons: 'Order Milk Today' (smooth-scrolls to Products section) and 'Pre-Order Mangoes' (smooth-scrolls to the mango pre-order form). Overlay a semi-transparent warm gradient to ensure text legibility.

Build an 'About N.B. Farm' section featuring the cow & rural farm illustration. Include these four key points in a warm, trustworthy tone: (1) Family-run traditional farm, (2) Ethical cow care & natural feeding, (3) Sustainable & chemical-free farming, (4) Rooted in Indian farming traditions with a focus on purity & authenticity. Use icon cards or illustrated list items with the earthy theme.

Build a Products section with two product cards. (1) Gir A2 Cow Milk card: product image, bullet points (From pure Gir cows, Rich in A2 protein, Fresh daily supply, No adulteration, Hygienically handled), price display '₹70 per litre', and a 'Subscribe / Order Now' button that opens the WhatsApp order link. (2) Natural Mangoes card: product image, two variant badges (Desi Mango, Kesar Mango), packaging options (5 kg box, 10 kg box), bullet points (Naturally ripened, Authentic Kutch region produce, Sweet aromatic & chemical-free, Limited seasonal availability), and a 'Pre-Order Now' CTA that smooth-scrolls to the pre-order form. Mark milk as 'Available Now' and mangoes as 'Pre-Order Open' with distinct status badges.

Build a Mango Pre-Order form section with fields: Mango Variant (dropdown: Desi Mango / Kesar Mango), Packaging (radio or dropdown: 5 kg box / 10 kg box), Quantity (number input, minimum 1), Customer Name (text input), and Phone Number (tel input, required). On submission, open a pre-filled WhatsApp message to 9978510084 with all form details. Show a total price calculation (quantity × box weight × ₹100/kg) dynamically before submission.

Build a 'Why Choose Us' section with five icon-and-text highlights arranged in a responsive grid: (1) Farm Fresh & Pure, (2) Ethical & Cruelty-Free, (3) No Chemicals or Preservatives, (4) Direct Farm-to-Home Supply, (5) Traditional Indian Values. Use warm-toned icons (SVG or emoji-style) consistent with the earthy aesthetic.

Build a Delivery Information section listing four delivery highlights: (1) Local doorstep delivery, (2) Fresh morning milk supply, (3) Seasonal mango shipping available, (4) Bulk orders accepted. Style as an icon-list or card grid consistent with the farm theme.

Build a Farm Location section with an embedded Google Maps iframe pointing to Ningal Village, Anjar, Kutch. Display the full address below the map: 'N.B. Farm, Khambhra – Ningal Road, Opposite HRCL Pumping Station, Ningal Village, Anjar, Kutch – 370110'. Use the Google Maps embed URL for the coordinates near Ningal Village, Anjar, Kutch (approximately lat 23.05, lng 70.05).

Build a Contact & Orders section with: (1) A prominent WhatsApp click-to-order button linking to 'https://wa.me/919978510084' with a pre-filled message 'Hello, I would like to place an order from N.B. Farm.', (2) A tel: link call button showing 9978510084 for mobile users, (3) Email address purvang2006@gmail.com as a mailto link, (4) A quick order inquiry form with Name, Phone, Message fields that on submit sends a WhatsApp message to 9978510084, (5) Placeholder social media icon links (Instagram, Facebook).

Build a Footer with: tagline 'Rooted in Tradition. Delivered with Purity.', full address (N.B. Farm, Khambhra – Ningal Road, Opposite HRCL Pumping Station, Ningal Village, Anjar, Kutch – 370110), phone 9978510084 and email purvang2006@gmail.com, quick navigation links to all page sections (Home, About, Products, Why Choose Us, Delivery, Location, Contact), and copyright line '© N.B. Farm. All rights reserved.'

Ensure the entire website is fully responsive (mobile-first), implements smooth scrolling for all anchor navigation, uses semantic HTML for SEO, and includes a sticky/fixed top navigation bar with the N.B. Farm logo/name and links to all sections. Navigation should collapse into a hamburger menu on mobile.
Render all generated images (hero background, cow/farm illustration, Gir cow milk product image, mango product image, N.B. Farm logo) as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated.

Update the mango pre-order pricing in PreOrderForm.tsx: the 5 kg box price is ₹650 (full price), with a pre-order discount of ₹50 bringing it to ₹600. Display both the original price (₹650) struck through and the discounted pre-order price (₹600) prominently. The 10 kg box price should remain calculated at ₹100/kg (i.e., ₹1000). Update the dynamic total price calculation accordingly: for 5 kg box selections, use ₹600 per box (discounted pre-order price); show the saving clearly (e.g., 'You save ₹50 per box!'). Update the WhatsApp pre-filled message to reflect the discounted price paid.

Add a Farm Photo Gallery section to the website using the four user-uploaded farm images (IMG_6907.jpeg — mango orchard/farm field, IMG_3212.jpeg — farm entrance road with trees, IMG_7581.jpeg — Gir calf resting at the farm, IMG_7588.jpeg — coconut palm at the farm). Place these images as static assets at frontend/public/assets/generated/ with filenames farm-gallery-1.jpg, farm-gallery-2.jpg, farm-gallery-3.jpg, farm-gallery-4.jpg respectively. Add a 'Our Farm' gallery section between the About section and the Products section (or between Products and Why Choose Us) displaying the four photos in a responsive grid (2×2 on desktop, 1-column on mobile). Style the section consistent with the earthy Indian rural theme — add a section title 'A Glimpse of Our Farm', use the painted-border card style, and include a short caption per image (e.g., 'Mango Orchard', 'Farm Entrance', 'Our Gir Calf', 'Farm Greenery').

In the About N.B. Farm section (AboutSection.tsx), find the text '3+ generations' (or any variant like '3+ generation of farming') and replace it with exactly '3 generations of farming' — removing the '+' symbol.

In ProductsSection.tsx, update the Natural Mangoes product card price display from '₹100/kg' to '₹650/kg'. Ensure the displayed price label reads '₹650 per kg' (or equivalent phrasing consistent with the existing card style).

In FarmGallerySection.tsx, expand the gallery grid to include the two new images (farm-gallery-5.jpg with caption 'Farm Life' and farm-gallery-6.jpg with caption 'Mango Orchard'). Update the responsive grid layout to accommodate 6 images (e.g., 3×2 on desktop, 2-column on tablet, 1-column on mobile), keeping the painted-border card style and lightbox functionality consistent with the existing four gallery images.

In FarmGallerySection.tsx, remove any emoji character from the 'Farm Entrance' caption or card (e.g., a road/gate emoji like 🛤️ or similar). The caption text should read plain 'Farm Entrance' with no emoji prefix or suffix.

In FarmGallerySection.tsx, verify that the image src paths for farm-gallery-5.jpg (caption 'Farm Life') and farm-gallery-6.jpg (caption 'Mango Orchard') correctly reference '/assets/generated/farm-gallery-5.jpg' and '/assets/generated/farm-gallery-6.jpg' respectively. Ensure the paths are absolute (starting with '/') so they resolve correctly regardless of the current route, matching the convention used for farm-gallery-1.jpg through farm-gallery-4.jpg.

In ContactSection.tsx, add a second phone number 9375310987 alongside the existing 9978510084. Display it as a tel: link call button, styled consistently with the existing phone contact card. Both numbers should be clearly visible and tappable on mobile.
In Footer.tsx, add the second phone number 9375310987 alongside the existing 9978510084 in the contact details area, styled consistently with the existing footer design.
In LocationSection.tsx, add the second phone number 9375310987 to the address/contact card alongside the existing 9978510084, styled consistently with the existing location section design.

In FarmGallerySection.tsx, completely remove the two bottom gallery entries: farm-gallery-5.jpg (caption 'Farm Life') and farm-gallery-6.jpg (caption 'Mango Orchard'). The gallery should display only the original four images (farm-gallery-1.jpg through farm-gallery-4.jpg). Update the responsive grid layout accordingly (e.g., 2×2 on desktop, 1-column on mobile), keeping the painted-border card style and lightbox functionality consistent.

In HeroSection.tsx, fix the top heading (e.g., 'Straight from Kutch, Gujarat' or similar tagline text near the top of the hero) that is partially cut off on page load due to the fixed navigation bar overlapping it. Add sufficient top padding or margin (e.g., pt-20 or equivalent) to the hero content container so the heading is fully visible below the fixed navigation bar without requiring any scrolling.

In HeroSection.tsx, add sufficient top padding or margin to the hero content container so the top heading ('Straight from Kutch, Gujarat' or equivalent tagline near the top of the hero) is fully visible below the fixed navigation bar on page load without any scrolling. Apply at least pt-20 (80px) or equivalent top offset to the content wrapper.

In FarmGallerySection.tsx, add six new images to the 'A Glimpse of Our Farm' gallery section as static assets saved at frontend/public/assets/generated/. The new entries are: farm-gallery-5.jpg with caption 'Harvesting at the Farm' (IMG_3229-1.jpeg — woman tending crops), farm-gallery-6.jpg with caption 'Farmer with Fresh Mangoes' (IMG_0151.jpeg — man holding mangoes), farm-gallery-7.jpg with caption 'Farm Pathway' (IMG_7577.jpeg — dirt road lined with coconut palms), farm-gallery-8.jpg with caption 'Our Gir Cows Grazing' (IMG_6349.jpeg — two Gir cows grazing), farm-gallery-9.jpg with caption 'Mango Orchard' (IMG_7576.jpeg — mango orchard view), farm-gallery-10.jpg with caption 'Fresh Lemon Tree' (image.png — lemon tree with green lemons). Update the gallery grid to display all images in a responsive layout (3×columns on desktop, 2-column on tablet, 1-column on mobile), with the existing painted-border card style and lightbox functionality. All image src paths must be absolute (starting with '/').

In ProductsSection.tsx, add a new product card for 'Farm Fresh Lemon' marked with status 'Available Now'. The card should display: product image using /assets/generated/farm-gallery-10.jpg, price '₹100 per kg', bullet points (Freshly harvested, Chemical-free, Sun-ripened on the farm, Rich in Vitamin C, Naturally grown in Kutch), and an 'Order Now' button that opens a WhatsApp link to https://wa.me/919978510084 with pre-filled message 'Hello, I would like to order Farm Fresh Lemon from N.B. Farm.' Style the card consistently with the existing Gir A2 Milk card using the earthy painted-border style.

In ProductsSection.tsx, update the Natural Mangoes product card price display from '₹650 per kg' (or '₹650/kg') to '₹650 per 5 kg box'. The price label must clearly read '₹650 / 5 kg box' or '₹650 per 5 kg', consistent with the existing card style.

In ProductsSection.tsx, add a new 'Seasonal Products' subsection or row featuring three product cards: (1) Jiru Powder — price ₹X/kg (mark as seasonal), bullet points (Stone-ground, Pure & natural, No additives, Traditional Kutch recipe), status badge 'Seasonal'; (2) Dhana Powder — similar treatment, status badge 'Seasonal'; (3) Dhana Jiru Powder — blend of coriander and cumin, similar treatment, status badge 'Seasonal'. Each card should have an 'Order Now' WhatsApp button linking to https://wa.me/919978510084 with a pre-filled message referencing the product name. Style all three cards using the earthy painted-border style consistent with the rest of the Products section. If a specific price per kg is not known, display 'Price on Request' or 'Contact Us for Price'. Mark all three as 'Seasonal' with a distinct seasonal badge.

In PreOrderForm.tsx, fix the WhatsApp pre-order submission so that on successful form submission, it correctly opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message to +919978510084 (https://wa.me/919978510084). The pre-filled message must include: customer name, phone number, mango variant (Desi Mango / Kesar Mango), packaging size (5 kg box / 10 kg box), quantity, and the total price (computed as: 5 kg box = ₹600 per box × quantity; 10 kg box = ₹1000 per box × quantity). Ensure the WhatsApp URL is correctly encoded using encodeURIComponent on the message text and that window.open() or a direct href is called with the full wa.me URL. Test that the button is not broken by missing encoding, a malformed URL, or an event handler that prevents default navigation.

Enhance the overall visual design of the website to make it look more premium and wonderful. Apply refined visual improvements throughout: (1) Add subtle entrance animations (fade-in, slide-up) to section headings and cards as they scroll into view; (2) Ensure all product cards have consistent hover effects with a gentle lift shadow using the earthy palette; (3) Add a warm golden shimmer or glow accent on section titles; (4) Ensure the 'Seasonal' product badges use a distinct warm terracotta or turmeric color to visually distinguish them from 'Available Now' and 'Pre-Order Open' badges; (5) Improve spacing and typography hierarchy across all sections for a more polished premium feel; (6) The earthy color palette (#6B3A2A, #E8A020, #4A7C3F, #C1440E, #FAF3E0) must be used consistently throughout.

In LocationSection.tsx, replace the existing Google Maps iframe embed URL with the embed URL derived from the shared Google Maps link https://maps.app.goo.gl/BNfu3qvxa3uTBePJ7. Convert this short link to a proper Google Maps embed URL (using https://maps.google.com/maps?q=...&output=embed or the equivalent embed format) so the iframe correctly displays the map view the user shared. The rest of the Location section (address text, phone numbers, styling) must remain unchanged.

In PreOrderForm.tsx, update the Desi Mango variant price to ₹200 per 5 kg box. The pricing logic must reflect this change: when 'Desi Mango' is selected with a '5 kg box' packaging, use ₹200 per box for the dynamic total price calculation. Update the displayed price label for Desi Mango to show ₹200 / 5 kg box (and remove or adjust any struck-through original price or discount display that was previously specific to the old ₹650/₹600 pricing for Desi Mango). Update the pre-filled WhatsApp message to reflect the new ₹200 per box price for Desi Mango orders. The Kesar Mango and 10 kg box pricing should remain unchanged.

In PreOrderForm.tsx, update the Desi Mango 10 kg box variant price to ₹350 per box. Update the dynamic total price calculation so that when 'Desi Mango' is selected with '10 kg box' packaging, the price used is ₹350 per box × quantity. Update the pre-filled WhatsApp message to reflect ₹350 per box for Desi Mango 10 kg box orders. The Desi Mango 5 kg box (₹200 per box), Kesar Mango 5 kg box, and Kesar Mango 10 kg box pricing must remain unchanged.

new_feature_requests.summary: Hero section with headline, subtext, farm sunrise background, and Order Milk / Pre-Order Mangoes CTA buttons
About N.B. Farm section: family-run, ethical cow care, sustainable farming, rooted in Indian traditions
Products section: Gir A2 Cow Milk (₹70/L) with subscribe CTA, and Natural Mangoes (₹100/kg, Desi & Kesar variants, 5kg/10kg boxes) with pre-order form including quantity & phone number
Why Choose Us section with icons highlighting farm-fresh, ethical, chemical-free, direct farm-to-home values
Delivery information section covering local doorstep delivery, morning milk supply, seasonal mango shipping, bulk orders
Google Maps integration for farm location at Ningal Village, Anjar, Kutch – 370110
Contact section with WhatsApp click-to-order button, quick order form, call button, social media icons, phone 9978510084 & email purvang2006@gmail.com
Footer with tagline 'Rooted in Tradition. Delivered with Purity.', address, quick links, copyright
Future expansion placeholders: milk subscription plans, customer testimonials, A2 milk health benefits, farm visit booking, festival offers

Store mango pre-orders submitted via the website in the backend. Each order record should include: customerName, phone, mangoVariant, packagingSize, quantity, totalPrice (computed), and a timestamp. Expose a query to retrieve all pre-orders (for admin review).
Mango pre-order pricing: 5kg box total price is ₹650, with a pre-order discount bringing it to ₹600. Show the discount clearly in the pre-order form.
Add user-uploaded farm images to the website (gallery or relevant sections).
Change '3+ generations' text to '3 generations of farming' (remove the '+').
Change the mango price in the Products section from ₹100/kg to ₹650/kg.
Remove the farm entrance emoji from the Farm Gallery section (likely from the Farm Entrance caption or card).

Add the two newly uploaded farm images (IMG_3229.jpeg — woman tending crops in farm field with coconut palms, IMG_5986.jpeg — mango orchard with rows of mango trees) as static assets at frontend/public/assets/generated/ with filenames farm-gallery-5.jpg and farm-gallery-6.jpg respectively.
Add a second mobile number 9375310987 to the contact section (alongside the existing 9978510084).
Remove farm-gallery-5.jpg (Farm Life) and farm-gallery-6.jpg (Mango Orchard) images from the gallery section entirely.
Fix the hero section heading ('Straight from Kutch, Gujarat' or similar) being cut off at the top when the page loads — move it lower so it is fully visible.
Add newly uploaded images to the Farm Gallery 'Glimpses' section with appropriate headings/captions.
Add a new available product 'Farm Fresh Lemon' priced at ₹100/kg to the Products section.
Change mango price display in Products section from ₹650/kg to ₹650 per 5kg box.
Add 3 seasonal products: Jiru Powder, Dhana Powder, and Dhana Jiru Powder to the Products section.
Fix the WhatsApp pre-order link/button for mangoes so it correctly opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message to 9978510084.
Update the Google Maps embed in the Location section to use the shared link: https://maps.app.goo.gl/BNfu3qvxa3uTBePJ7
In the pre-order mango section (PreOrderForm.tsx), change the price of Desi Mango to ₹200 per 5kg box.
In PreOrderForm.tsx, update the Desi Mango 10 kg box variant price to ₹350 per box. Update the dynamic total price calculation and the pre-filled WhatsApp message accordingly.
